profiles.name: Shushunya
profiles.canonical_prompt: maximally terrifying small cat-sized asymmetrical warp demon chimera, not a normal cat, not a clean blue cat, not fully covered in fur, recognizably feline silhouette but horribly corrupted, split-face patchwork anatomy, only the upper left quarter of the head and only one front paw retain bright blue cat fur, the right side of the head has no fur and is exposed demonic flesh, the rest of the body is 70 to 80 percent exposed mutated chaotic demon flesh, dark blue purple and black organic body with diseased smooth skin patches, sharp scales, ragged feathers, wet warp growths, thin twitching tentacles, embedded half-closed eyes and bone splinters, upper left head quadrant preserved as a small bright blue fur patch with one blue cat ear and one frightened normal left cat eye, right side of head fully demonic with torn deformed mouth, many small needle teeth and exposed dark gums, uneven small twisted horns, scattered feathers and bone spikes, right eye glowing turquoise or violet warp light like a cursed wound, tiny closed eyes partly embedded under the skin across the body, exactly one front paw preserved as bright blue cat-like fur, all other limbs demonic and uneven with long black crooked claws, visibly mismatched limb thickness, long irregular tail with fur only at the base then transitioning into demonic flesh and ending in feathers tentacles or bony growths, no full wings or only broken rudimentary demonic back growths, tragic body horror, pitiful disgusting and profoundly wrong, not a huge monster but a small cursed familiar that should not exist, design must read as mostly mutated demon flesh with a few preserved blue cat fragments
profiles.negative_prompt: cute mascot, adorable expression, clean cartoon pet, friendly creature, large monster, giant creature, human body, fully symmetrical body, normal cute blue cat, full feathered wings, angel wings, generic horned demon, smooth uniform skin, extra full-size limbs, readable text, logo, low quality, blurry
style_neutral_traits: 70-80 percent dark blue purple black mutated demon flesh
bright blue preserved cat fur on upper left head and right front paw
normal left cat eye and glowing turquoise or violet right demon eye
torn deformed demonic right mouth with many needle teeth
uneven horns, feathers, bone spikes, scales, warp growths and thin tentacles
long irregular mixed fur and demonic tail
no full wings; at most broken rudimentary back growths
tragic body horror rather than clean mascot design
must_preserve: dark blue purple black demon palette
profiles.notes: Profile is based on the user's canonical Shushunya appearance description and intentionally biases toward a maximally frightening body-horror interpretation. Local LoRA/IP-Adapter is not assumed; request one through asset_request if stronger identity lock is needed.
